name: Souper Gravy for Roast Meat or Poultry
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons roasted meat or poultry drippings in pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine condensed Cream of Chicken, Cream of Mushroom, or Cream of Broccoli Soup with 1/3 cup water.
2. After roasting the meat or poultry, remove the roast from the pan and spoon out any excess fat, reserving about 2 to 4 tablespoons drippings.
3. Stir in the soup mixture and water over medium heat until heated through. Stir to loosen browned bits.
4. Serve with the roast. Makes about 1 1/2 cups gravy.
